user_message: <task> Review the implementation of ec_decision_search — a new FTS-based keyword search for EntireContext decisions. Read all modified files, then produce a detailed code review. Files to read: - src/entirecontext/core/decisions.py (fts_search_decisions, hybrid_search_decisions at the end) - src/entirecontext/mcp/tools/decisions.py (ec_decision_search tool, _format_decision_results helper, registration) - src/entirecontext/cli/decisions_cmds.py (ec decision search CLI command) - tests/test_decisions_core.py (TestDecisionFTSSearch class, 7 tests) - tests/test_mcp_registration.py (ec_decision_search in expected tools set) </task> <review_focus> 1. SQL safety: fts_search_decisions uses (? IS NULL OR d.updated_at >= ?) pattern. Is it correct and safe? 2. FTS5 error handling: bad queries (e.g., AND OR NOT) return empty list. Right behavior vs returning an error? 3. Cross-repo pattern: uses _for_each_repo() callback. Is the callback signature correct? 4. Hybrid search: reuses rrf_fuse() from search.py. Is RRF fusion correctly applied? 5. MCP response format: _format_decision_results() truncates rationale to 200 chars. Consistent with other decision tools? 6. Test coverage: 7 tests — are there gaps? 7. Any bugs, edge cases, or issues? </review_focus> <grounding_rules> - Base every finding on the actual file content you read. Do not invent issues. - If something looks suspicious but you cannot confirm it is a bug from the code alone, flag it as a concern rather than a definite bug. - Cite the relevant function name or line range for each finding. </grounding_rules> <structured_output_contract> For each review focus area, provide: - PASS / CONCERN / BUG label - Specific finding with function name and line reference - Recommendation if needed Conclude with a ranked list of the top issues (if any) that must be fixed before merge. </structured_output_contract> <default_follow_through_policy> Read every file completely before writing any review output. Do not skip sections. </default_follow_through_policy>
assistant_summary: 요청한 범위의 변경 파일을 전부 끝까지 읽고, `ec_decision_search` 구현을 리뷰 관점으로 점검하겠습니다. 먼저 관련 스킬 지침과 대상 파일들을 읽은 뒤, 각 포인트별로 확인 가능한 버그와 우려를 구분해서 정리하겠습니다.
